channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: Passengers speak out after sea plane makes hard landing in East River in NYC
item.description: A Kodiak 100 seaplane with eight people on board made a hard landing into the East River near Brooklyn, New York.

item.title: 6-year-old drowns on New York beach after being caught in strong current
item.description: The girl and her family were visiting Southampton beach on the 4th of July.

item.title: AI actor Tilly Norwood set to star in first feature film
item.description: AI-generated actor Tilly Norwood is set to star in her first feature film, with her creator saying that 'art will be imitating life.'

item.title: WATCH: Beyoncé drops new music on Fourth of July
item.description: Lara Spencer shares the buzziest stories of the day in 'GMA' Pop News.
